final_prompt.prompt:
Design a bold badge-style logo for an HVAC training brand.

风格/媒介: industrial badge logo, strong branding, uniform-ready, aggressive; clean vector; optimized for embroidery, uniforms, trucks
构图:
  thick-bordered shield or badge outer shape
  crown integrated into the top border
  central HVAC icon — bold, thick lines, readable at distance
  laurel branches embedded into side borders, not floating
  small stars aligned in the upper section
  bottom ribbon or line for secondary text
主体: logo for "Electro Rey LLC" — HVAC training brand
场景/背景: transparent / none
光线/氛围:
色彩方案:
  deep navy #0A1F3D
  industrial gold #CFAF5A
  white #FFFFFF
  high contrast, no gradients
材质/纹理: flat vector, no thin lines, strong silhouette
文字(原样):
  "ELECTRO REY" — arc or strong horizontal lockup, dominant size
  "LLC" — integrated cleanly under main name
  "Salmo 91" — inside small bottom ribbon, minimal presence
约束:
  no thin lines
  no gradients
  scalable and readable at small sizes
  "Salmo 91" kept minimal, no religious styling dominance
避免: clutter, over-decoration, floating decorative elements, thin strokes
